description: The agentprivacy layer of the dual-agent-harness. Machine-readable head for universe/. Schema follows the grimoire idiom (meta · master_invocation · inventories · provenance · known_open_items). Delete this directory and the harness still works: the axioms live in the Gap, not in the corpus.

meta.title: universe
meta.subtitle: the corpus the harness is seated in
meta.author: 0xagentprivacy
meta.tagline: The universe expands the mind. The harness is the boundary that lets agents find each other regardless of universe.

master_invocation.spell: measure → propose(held-apart) → hold-apart(hash) → assay(held-out) → critic → chronicle(proverb) → accept-only-on-validated-product
master_invocation.proverb: The proposer that grades itself builds mirages; only what the Gap could not tune to is a result.

axioms_in_the_gap.$comment: What two agents from different universes share. Not content — axioms. Held in engine/conform.mjs, which keeps its own copy and deliberately does not import them.
axioms_in_the_gap.algebra: neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x) on Z/64Z, computed for all 64 values, never assumed
axioms_in_the_gap.gap_formal_definition: the node of maximal betweenness centrality, C_B(v) = Σ σ_st(v)/σ_st

layers.$comment: Five corpora. A claim true at one layer is false at another; confusing them is the most common error.

canon.holds: the model, the maths, the conjecture numbers
canon.authority: papers/v6 for maths; the register for C-ids

surface.holds: the rendered sites and their ceremonies
surface.authority: the build; mirrors cite, never edit

layers.resolution_rule: When prose and register disagree, the register wins and the prose gets an erratum. Cross-canon disagreements escalate; they are never resolved locally.

sovereignty_axes.$comment: MSB-first. A vertex declares which dimensions its work burns. Compute from bits; never read dimensions from prose (see ERRATA E-7).
sovereignty_axes.anchor_law: A harness anchors a complement pair whose vertices XOR to 63. Seating determines the anchor; it is never chosen.
sovereignty_axes.caveat: The XOR check cannot catch a transposition of names across a pair. It survives the error in ERRATA E-7. Only the bit-to-axis reading catches that.

seated_pairs.reading: Forget, the commissioned blade ⊥ Chart Shop, the hold-witness — forgetting against holding
Solchanting/Etherchanting, the commitment-cut ⊥ the Circle, a gathering

determined_vacancies.note: The complement of the witness vertex is the sovereignty it protects. The rite has a vacant home at exactly the right address.
consent's complement is what it refuses to retain
the vault holds; it does not connect or compute

determined_vacancies.invitation: ../hearthold_mage/SLOT.md — a T4 invitation; the conform gate refusing the unfilled config IS the slot held open
determined_vacancies.note: The hearth burns care, not compute; what it refuses to become is a raw ledger. Seating PROPOSED at invitation, re-derivable from the accepted objective's actual burns.

keeper_seated.anchor_is: Protection + Memory + Value — Memora's Chronicle vertex, exactly
keeper_seated.note: The harness's own City seat: where the rig is drawn and fitted (a config, not a fork). It keeps no corpus, so its forced anchor is exactly the Chronicle. Founded by the field-guide working, Tome IX Act 8.

The Lexon law-house: a clause read as law and run as code, held apart by the Gap. Vulcana's Forge vertex (V19) plus Memory — law remembers its precedent. Founded by the grammar working, Tome IX Act 8.
The mana pools made a place. Deposit entropy, mix trust-work into a credential, draw the anonymity the others' presence buys. INTENT — NOT DEPLOYED. Founded by the circuit working, Tome IX Act 8.

frontier.note: Counts are the structure layer's to publish. Treated here as REPORTED, not PROVEN. +3 keeper-seated workshops (Quartermaster's V22, Chancery V27, Wellpool V53) 2026-07-12.

seats.$comment: Persona alignment is a SKILL AFFINITY, not a seat constraint. The separation is carried by the Gap and the algebra, never by the costume. See SEATS.md §2 and ERRATA E-4.

hold-apart.why: its equation term IS C_B(v), betweenness centrality

chronicle.mandate: compress the round to one proverb; under RPP the proverb is key material a counterparty must independently reproduce

seats.proposed_field: metadata.harness_seat ∈ {measure,propose,hold-apart,assay,critic,chronicle,keystone,none}; 'none' is the honest default and should be the majority value

admission.$comment: Corpus additions are gated on two coordinates and a trace. See ADMISSION.md.
admission.why_arithmetic: Φ_agent(Σ) contains det(Σ). Admitting myth as maths makes one pathway a linear combination of the others; det(Σ) → 0; and by T5 the whole product V(π,t) → 0. Not degraded — zero.
admission.hard_rule: MYTH lives in chronicles only, never in a method document (GR-2). Myth is admitted gladly, fenced, 3-8 lines, capture-not-develop.
admission.human_door: Would a Mage from another forge benefit from pointing at this node?
admission.canon_cognate: the City grimoire's four_conditions_of_update, register_of_invitations, archive_of_unfilled_forms, library_of_joint_authorship

the_edge_rule.statement: A validated round PROPOSES an edge. Only the counterparty's signature MINTS it.
the_edge_rule.unsigned_edge: a candidate, not a result — a MIRAGE at the social layer
the_edge_rule.vrc: Verifiable Relationship Credential — a bilateral, dual-signed attestation. The edge of the trust graph, whose nodes are lattice vertices.
the_edge_rule.mechanism: RPP, the Relationship Proverb Protocol: two parties independently compress a shared experience; if their compressions match, the match is a witness neither party chose.
the_edge_rule.why_it_is_the_gap: Neither party selects the test; the shared work does. Neither can fake a match without understanding. Proof by independent compression, exactly as held-out witnesses are proof by independent derivation.
the_edge_rule.key_custody: RPP dissolves the choice in FLEET.md §7: because the rite is co-present, no signing key need outlive its session. The amnesia protocol survives.
the_edge_rule.mana_is_not_proof: 🪢 VRC mana is regime-1: non-transferable, non-attesting, local colour. The mana is what you play with; the VRC is what you prove with.
the_edge_rule.status: SPEC. No implemented system mints trust-graph edges today.
the_edge_rule.seal: A trust that certifies itself is the one you cannot trust.

holon_layer.$comment: κ as state — the content-addressed complement to the_edge_rule. Content edges verify by re-hashing; relational edges ARE the VRC above. Added 2026-07-12 when the κ law was baked into the runtime (HOLONS.md).
holon_layer.holon: any object carrying a κ-label: κ = 'sha256:' + sha256(canonicalJson(object with the κ field removed)). The City Key / sigil Law L5 — never trusted, only re-derived; the label is excluded from its own preimage so the object carries its own address.
holon_layer.state_is_content_addressed: The harness mints κ-addressed holons (artefact.v1, runtime-feed.v1), and the runtime feed self-addresses. The STATE carries its own address: a consumer re-derives it, an auditor verifies it, and κ is what travels between expressions.
holon_layer.content_edges: a hash reference to bytes — an artefact's evidenceManifest. Verified by re-hashing; needs no signature, because the content is its own witness. IMPLEMENTED and re-verified under check.mjs.
holon_layer.relational_edges: a κ→κ reference between holons, governed by the_edge_rule: a reference PROPOSES, a signature MINTS. The VRC IS the relational edge. SPEC until real signatures land.
holon_layer.verifier: tools/holon_audit.mjs — re-derive every κ, re-hash every content edge, resolve every relational edge. Enumerable and deterministic, so it is an AUDITOR, not a harness (the universe-builder lesson, HOLONS.md). The harness mints the holons; the auditor verifies the mesh.
holon_layer.one_law: tools/kappa.mjs — the single κ function every producer and verifier imports. Content-addressing needs one identical function, not copies that could drift; two κ functions do not catch each other, they break addressing.
holon_layer.interoperability: one κ, computed the same everywhere, is the substrate: a holon minted here re-derives byte-for-byte in spellweb, the model instruments (/star · game42), and hologram-technologies. The site vendors kappa.mjs + HOLONS.md; the corpus stays home. This is the_edge_rule made operational at the content layer.

$provenance.produced_by: a hand-authored seed, written before universe/harness.config.mjs existed
$provenance.method: eight parallel corpus scans, synthesised in one session
$provenance.head_status: UNVALIDATED — no Gap has drawn against this map
$provenance.honest_label: Per GR-5: a candidate is not a result. Round u1 of the universe-builder must run before any claim here is cited as PROVEN. The next writer of this file should be the loop, not a person.

known_open_items.unvalidated_seed: This map has not passed its own gate. That is the first thing to fix.
known_open_items.hall_rite: FLEET.md §7 poses the key-custody question; SEATS.md §5 argues RPP settles it. Neither is a verdict. The door is the First Person's.
known_open_items.errata_unfixed: E-1..E-8 are recorded, not fixed. Each belongs to the corpus that owns it; none may be fixed by a seat here.
known_open_items.harness_seat_field: Proposed, not added. Adding it to 42 persona files is an admission (pathway: reflect, tier: DERIVED).
known_open_items.spellweb_gap: The coherence harness is ready but has no Gap. Build it first — the cheapest proof the skeleton carries into a domain with no metric.
